metadata.title: Ignite The Sky
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Begin At The End
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Forgetting Is The Greatest Of All Mercies
03 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Ignite The Sky And Erase All Evidence Of Us Ever Being Here
04 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - There Is No Life Here; We Simply Exist
05 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Carry Our Punishment Out In Silence
